Applicant - LoginPage中的类
Entity class representing a TA applicant in the recruitment system.
Applicant(String, String, String, String, String, String, String, String) - 类的构造器 LoginPage.Applicant
Constructs an Applicant with all fields.
ApplicationDialog - TAUI中的类
Boundary Class - Submit Application Dialog Uses JDialog to implement a modal dialog without leaving the main interface.
ApplicationDialog(JFrame, TAController, Job, String) - 类的构造器 TAUI.ApplicationDialog
 
ApplicationRecord - TAUI中的类
Entity Class: Application Record * This class encapsulates all data related to a single job application submitted by a Teaching Assistant.
ApplicationRecord(Job, String, CVRecord, String) - 类的构造器 TAUI.ApplicationRecord
Comprehensive constructor to initialize a new application record.
approveModule(String) - 类中的方法 AdminPage.Admin_CourseApplicationControl
 
authenticate(String, String) - 类中的方法 LoginPage.LoginController
Processes the login attempt.

T

TAController - TAUI中的类
Control Class: TA Controller Handles the core business logic, data routing, and persistence (mock database) for the Teaching Assistant application system.
TAController() - 类的构造器 TAUI.TAController
Default constructor.
TADashboardUI - TAUI中的类
Boundary Class - TA Dashboard Implements a Master-Detail view with advanced filtering capabilities.
TADashboardUI(User, TAController) - 类的构造器 TAUI.TADashboardUI
 
TATest - TAUI中的类
Application entry point Responsible for instantiating the Control and binding it to the Boundary.
TATest() - 类的构造器 TAUI.TATest
 
TAUI - 程序包 TAUI
 
toString() - 类中的方法 TAUI.ApplicationRecord
Overrides the default toString method.
toString() - 类中的方法 TAUI.CVRecord
这一步非常关键！
toString() - 类中的方法 TAUI.Job
Overrides the toString method to determine the text format displayed in the left JList component.
